blocks.content: He met Ryan three weeks later at a Friday night football game.
Daisy introduced them in the stands.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Kit, this is Ryan. Ryan, Kit. We've been friends since we were eight.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: She told you about the water tower.

blocks.speaker: Ryan
blocks.content: She mentioned it. Said you climbed it when you were twelve.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I don't exaggerate. I stated a fact.
Ryan laughed and Kit shook his hand. Ryan was tall. He had the easy manner of someone who knew how to fit into a new place quickly.
Kit did not like how much he noticed about Ryan Callaway.
Daisy laughed at something Ryan said in the second quarter, and Kit looked at the field.
